emails.subject: 7EA Deals
emails.body: 7EA Deals Kay: As you know, I just love to pile on. I took what I think are the latest form docs and made some changes to incorporate additional commercial terms I want to go out with. Please review the attached clean and redline drafts. In the interest of time, would it be OK for Caroline to review (I've really got people chomping at the bit). Thanks, Ben

emails.subject: Re: 7EA Deals
emails.body: Re: 7EA Deals I've contacted John Keffer and asked them to help. I will initiate the approval process to get he and Carolyn retained. Kay From: Ben F Jacoby ECT 01/04/2001 08:43 PM Sent by: Ben Jacoby@ECT
